questionHtml: ICP-OES/MS can be used to analyse alloys and composites. Distinguish between alloys and composites.
markschemeHtml:
Alloy:

mixture of metal with other metals/non-metals

OR

mixture of elements that retains the properties of a metal

 

Composite:

reinforcing phase embedded in matrix phase

 

Award [1 max] for implying “composites only have heterogeneous/nonhomogeneous compositions”.

[2 marks]

meta.title: ICP-OES/MS can be used to analyse alloys and composites. Distinguish between alloys and composites.
